runtimeNotes: No new image generation. The active atlas is derived from pass-06 lowpoly by blanking reference/track cells, normalizing visible hull/body and turret/barrel bounds, and applying ImageMagick brightness/saturation modulation. The transparent track frame still covers track source parts, so SVG tracks do not render.
notes: Brighter no-imagegen follow-up intended to improve readability against the map/background while preserving the pass-06 silhouette and component split.
